sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Pasian in kiteenna pawi bawlkhinzo hi,
A siangtho innkuan a suak dingin;
A siangtho nuntakna a nei ding.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hih lungdamna thu vantung dong thangsak un,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Jesuh in Tapidawte a it manin,
Hih zi neipa in zong tua bangin hih hen,
A siangtho thu hilhna zui ta

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Topa Nang khut sungah hihte omta hen,
Thahatna teng Nang ading zang hen.
